title: 138,610 Shares in SPDR S&P Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF $SPYX Purchased by Xponance Inc.
description: Xponance Inc. bought a new stake in shares of SPDR S&P Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF (NYSEARCA:SPYX – Free Report) during the 3rd quarter, according to the company in its most recent disclosure with the SEC. The fund bought 138,610 shares of the company’s stock, valued at approximately $7,603,000. A number of other large investors [...]

title: New 'hell heron' Spinosaurus species found in remote Sahara 70 years after fossil clue
description: Scientists have discovered Spinosaurus mirabilis, a massive "hell heron" dinosaur that rivaled T. rex and hunted fish in ancient waters some 100 million years ago.

title: Ancient Greek mystery cult priestesses may have chemically tweaked fungus to induce psychedelic hallucinations
description: Ancient followers of the Eleusinian Mysteries may have used a highly toxic fungus to create psychedelic hallucinations during their rituals, a new chemical analysis suggests.

title: Search for early Mithila civilisation: ASI gives fresh nod to excavation at ancient Balirajgarh site
description: The approval, issued by the ASI headquarters in New Delhi on February 26, is valid for one year and authorises the ASI’s Patna Circle to undertake excavation at the centrally protected site

title: Budapest eatery offers ancient 'pizza'
description: BUDAPEST, Hungary — In Hungary's capital, a city best known for its goulash, a pizzeria invites diners to travel back two millennia to a time before tomatoes, mozzarella or even the word "pizza" were known in Europe.
